head.subject: feat(workflow): WorkflowAssistantAgent — natural language → workflow YAML (Phase 13 M1)

summary.mainConclusion: Core Hub design is still aligned with the original north star, but protocol, documentation, workflow assistant packaging, and quality gates need cleanup.

findings.title: @aipehub/protocol depends on @aipehub/core
findings.impact: Protocol is no longer the lowest-level wire contract and pulls core into lightweight protocol consumers.
findings.recommendation: Move wire primitives into protocol or a shared zero-runtime types package; remove protocol -> core dependency.

findings.title: Architecture documents are stale
evidence: docs/zh/ARCHITECTURE.md claims it is the truth source
docs/zh/V4-ARCH.md still says Phase 1 in progress
AGENTS.md is untracked and has outdated package counts / next-step table
findings.impact: Agents and maintainers can follow stale guidance and recreate old decisions.
findings.recommendation: Commit/update AGENTS.md, mark old architecture docs historical or refresh the current truth source.

findings.title: @aipehub/workflow includes LLM authoring
findings.impact: Workflow runner package is no longer just schema / runner / validator.
findings.recommendation: Move WorkflowAssistantAgent into @aipehub/workflow-assistant or host/web integration package.

findings.title: Workflow assistant returns ok even without usable YAML
evidence: assistant.ts deliberately does not validate YAML
assistant.test.ts expects missing fence -> kind ok and yaml empty
findings.impact: Callers may treat an unusable draft as successful.
findings.recommendation: Add validation status or return failed/no_yaml when extraction fails; route layer should parseWorkflow before import.

findings.title: pnpm test:python fails without implicit import setup
evidence: pnpm test:python fails with ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'aipehub'
findings.impact: Root quality gate is not reproducible on current workspace state.
findings.recommendation: Set PYTHONPATH=src in the script or add explicit editable-install bootstrap.

findings.title: Several implementation files are too large
findings.impact: Maintenance and security review cost is increasing.
findings.recommendation: Split route/domain modules and admin UI feature modules incrementally.
